# MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.localFlatten3D

**Case**

Returns indices within pooling window, flattened in 3 innernost dimensions. eg: HWC in NHWC.

## Declaration

```swift
case localFlatten3D
```
title: MPSGraphPoolingReturnIndicesMode.localFlatten3D
